reviews.review_description: Go straight to the mixed reality training feature. The focus mitts use a standard 1-10 punching system that all the boxing coaches I have trained under has used. The heavy bag satisfies the continuous punching need that will burn the most calories. If you looking for some quality practice while away from the gym or need to learn your 1-10 punches fast this will definitely help. Some glaring differences I see is there’s no slipping the punch just ducking, the combination are random every time where I am used to drilling the same 3-4 combinations in a session, and the coach calls out the combination every time while I’m used to a few random jabs to test my guard the the pads are flashed to start the combo. All in all you can tell the developers went to a boxing gym.
I got this game when it first came out and barely got any updates.

Campaign is polished and very well done. MR implementation is mediocre - low difficulty show matches which add little if you already have this flat on PSVR or such like me. Good training modes in VR or MR but the coach insults you, so have fun with that if your use for VR exercise is recovery days - that junk has taken this out of my exercise rotation and made me second guess the 5th star, but in the end getting such well made exercise without being gauged by a subscription outweighs that gripe.

If you own a meta quest 3 do not buy it. The controller is supposed to load into boxing gloves when you first launch the game, so that you can select a save file. The problem is my controllers don’t turn into boxing gloves, they just remain as the meta quest 3 controllers with the grey hand outline. So I’m soft locked in the “choose a save file” menu and cannot even play the game. Have tried everything, no solutions online either.

I recommend getting this game it’s so fun but it needs more than just 9 opponents here’s why if there’s more opponents the more fun and better the sales what do you say will you make more opponents pls
This is a great game with great graphics. I hope the developers make more games like this!
If you don’t like punch out, don’t play. If you are looking for something like creed or thrill of the fight, don’t do this. But this was something I needed since the last punch out was in 2009
Best boxing game I ever tried

reviews.review_title: It was a fun game till Oktopunch
reviews.review_description: Game was fun and then I went up against Oktopunch and his special is unfair, not only does he use it four to five times in a row but it’s unblock about unless you move out of bounds then you have to get hit to get in bounds. You physically can’t beat him

reviews.review_title: Punch out knock off… but it’s good?
reviews.review_description: W
Can I please get a refund? I just didn’t really like the game and the octopus is too hard to beat. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Please can I have a refund
reviews.review_description: This game isn't as described. I was very disappointed, was boring. It's not worth the money. So please could you issue me with a refund. Thanks.

This is a great game definitely recommend I don’t know why people are saying showtime is impossible and don’t like the game anymore just get good at the game I beat him third try the fake punch is wimpy anyway great game love it

reviews.review_title: Amazing game but I have a glitch
reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game and I'm at showtime on grudge match and I think he's glitched because when you dodge or block everything he goes "not yet" or something and then continually does that, like infinitely until you stop or get hit and then he does that every time.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the report! An upcoming update will improve the stability of the Showtime fight for both Normal and Grudge versions. You should no longer experience the issue once that becomes available.

reviews.review_description: Absolute waist of money

Very disappointing cannot get past the first level. Unfortunately for me, I’m new to the gaming world, so I guess I’m SOL. I have tried to get a refund. I, unfortunately, will learn the lesson the hard way. I suppose I have not played this, and I am very disappointed. Beware unless you’re a genius and can figure it out￼.
Don't buy this game the first 5 fight are well balanced but the the 6th is just ridiculously hard for no reason
The bounds are too small to move or dodge
Octo is hard to fight there is a attack I can not dodge🐙🐙🐙

reviews.review_title: Trainer is a lot of fun....
reviews.review_description: It's a shame the actual gameplay is so very bad. If it was even a decent rip-off of Punch-Out it would be way better.  Fortunately I bought it just for the trainer, otherwise I'd rate it way lower.

I was excited to play this exercise game but after the first couple of minutes, I was pretty disappointed. Seems to have pretty juvenile graphics and doesn’t play well in a real fight.
That may be the way  the app works, but if it is, it is not for me since I was looking for a little more realism.
It is a awful game
Good game 🎮

This game is fun but could be frustrating sometimes. For example, sometimes I block but it doesn’t work. Also, I dodge an opponent’s attack but it doesn’t work either sometimes. Another thing too is that I sometimes get out of bounds when I dodge an attack which is really annoying. But other than that, this game is pretty fun and is a good game for exercise. Be warned though that this game can make you feel really tired. Like, my leg felt sore when I kept ducking, and so as my arms when I punched an opponent. I was sweating just after like 1 or 2 fights too. Just what I’m saying is that they could fix some problems with this game and make it less frustrating. If you like boxing games then I would recommend buying this game but there is better boxing games on the store. Anyways, I hope you found this helpful.

Dumbest game ever created. Tetris makes more sense. Have the creators have never watched a fight before? You're allowed to block for ½ a second, otherwise blocking doesnt work. If you do block and punch right after... it doesnt work because the opponent has to finish the animation first. Your opponent actually drops thier block, and performs some stupid wind up animation for a punch.... oh, you can't punch them while their guard is down and they are doing some stupid dance before they punch you. To the creators..... go pick a fight with someone, and do all the dumb crap you have in this game... make sure you take a picture of your face afterwards and post it. Waste of money. Go play thrill of the fight.... it an actual boxing game, not this garbage! Unfortunately you have to give 1 star in order to make a post. It doesnt even deserve this. I wish there was trial version first.... didnt have to waste $22.99.
This is so un f****ng fair

The game looks pretty, but gameplay is really one dimensional, and even the simplistic duck and counter mechanic doesn't work because the timing rhythm is hard to read and it's hard to gauge exactly what movement counts as a dodge for what. Not worth your time or money.
I hate showtime I just delete the game all in getting rid of showtime I hate this game  so much I would rather stick my d!ck on a cactus instead this garbage of a game
I hate it I can’t tell if it is even possible to get passed Octopunch
It's hard but that is what makes it fun, and the feeling when you finally beat someone is amazing, but I've been stuck on showtime, I wish they added more time, at least for showtime.
Good
My 9 year old son loves this game! He gets a great workout and has fun while doing it!

It is so good when you need exercise. I recommend it to gamers who want exercise and if you beat someone who is hard then boy you would be sweating! That was me after I finally beat scurvy Jones. And also the easiest boss on the game is actually volt because when I fought him I got a momentum of 50x
So active fun great lots of thought put into it 5 STARS 😸😸😸😸😸😸😸😸😸😸😸😸🙀🙀😸🙂🙂🙂🙂

reviews.review_title: This game made me sore but fun.
reviews.review_description:
Graphics at first is hard to get used to. 
Gameplay is quick.
It is not a easy game.
And after one round I was laying on the floor to tired to move. 
Also the first time playing I went through 5 people without stopping big mistake I was incredibly sore for the next two days so go through one to two people a day so you don’t die like me.
Every time you hit them it just goes through them
Best game ever
I get stuck on a screen that says “Select File”. There’s three boxes that say New Game but it won’t let me select any of them? I tried restarting my system and I have allowed all permissions

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about this issue. We have since made multiple improvements to the game, including a recent FREE mixed reality update for Quest 2 and 3 users. Hope you can find the time to give it a try and let us know if the problem you're experiencing has been resolved.

reviews.review_description: This game is worth it's price for the focus mitts & heavy bag training sessions alone. Anyone with Supernatural or FitXR should have this game too!!
